_comment: HPC System Configuration File. Copy to config/hpc_config.json (gitignored) or ~/.config/autotuner/hpc_config.json
_usage: Define your HPC systems here. The 'system' name you pass to master_tuner.py should match a key in 'systems'.

example-hpc-gpu._comment: Example GPU partition — replace partition name, modules, and scratch paths for your facility

example-hpc-cpu._comment: Example CPU partition — mpiP Run 1a uses srun + LD_PRELOAD when mpip_mvapich_srun is true

example_system._comment: Minimal template — modify for your cluster

_environment_variables._comment: You can also set these environment variables instead of using a config file
_environment_variables.HPC_MODULES: Comma-separated list of modules to load
_environment_variables.HPC_LAUNCHER: Override launcher (e.g. mpirun) — merged into SlurmManager system_config
_environment_variables.HPC_MPIP_MVAPICH_SRUN: Override MVAPICH mpiP Run-1a srun path: 1/true/yes or 0/false/no
_environment_variables.HPC_SRUN_MPI_FLAG: Extra srun flag for mpiP preload (e.g. --mpi=pmi2) — overrides hpc_config when set
